name: @ashlr/stack-site
description: Marketing site for Ashlr Stack — stack.ashlr.ai

scripts.dev: bun run gen:cli-ref && bun run sync-content && bun run sync-install && bun run sync-phantom-brand && astro dev
scripts.start: bun run gen:cli-ref && bun run sync-content && bun run sync-install && bun run sync-phantom-brand && astro dev
scripts.build: bun run gen:cli-ref && bun run sync-content && bun run sync-install && bun run sync-phantom-brand && astro build
scripts.sync-install: cp -f ../../scripts/install.sh public/install.sh 2>/dev/null || true; cp -f ../../scripts/install.ps1 public/install.ps1 2>/dev/null || true
